lineage.Process: UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Downloads\AtlGulffreshwaterInflowsOutflows</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Atl+Gulf_Missing_Inflows.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>comment</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
DeleteField Atl+Gulf_Missing_Inflows Id "Delete Fields"

Intersect "Atl+Gulf_Missing_Inflows #;atlgulf_reference_nhdhr_flowpaths #" C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\PacNextGenInflows\PacNextGenInflows.gdb\AtlGulf_Missing_In_Intersect "All attributes" # Point
DeleteField AtlGulf_Missing_In_Intersect FID_atlgulf_reference_nhdhr_flowpaths "Delete Fields"

Merge AtlGulf_Missing_In_Intersect;unint C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\PacNextGenInflows\PacNextGenInflows.gdb\AtlGulf_Missing_In_Int_Merge "FID_Atl_Gulf_Missing_Inflows "FID_Atl_Gulf_Missing_Inflows" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,AtlGulf_Missing_In_Intersect,FID_Atl_Gulf_Missing_Inflows,-1,-1;comment "comment" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,AtlGulf_Missing_In_Intersect,comment,0,254,unint,comment,0,254;id "id" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,AtlGulf_Missing_In_Intersect,id,-1,-1,unint,id,-1,-1;vpuID "vpuID" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,AtlGulf_Missing_In_Intersect,vpuID,0,254,unint,vpuID,0,255;domain "domain" true true false 512 Text 0 0,First,#,AtlGulf_Missing_In_Intersect,domain,0,512,unint,domain,0,255;flowdir "flowdir" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,unint,flowdir,-1,-1" NO_SOURCE_INFO
DeleteField AtlGulf_Missing_In_Int_Merge FID_Atl_Gulf_Missing_Inflows "Delete Fields"
CalculateField AtlGulf_Missing_In_Int_Merge flowdir 1 "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateGeometryAttributes AtlGulffreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed "long POINT_X;lat POINT_Y" # # GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] "Same as input"
CalculateField AtlGulffreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed hl_link ""AtlGulf" + str(!OBJECTID!)" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateGeometryAttributes AtlGulffreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed "long POINT_X;lat POINT_Y" # # GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] "Same as input"

JoinField AtlGulf_InflowsOutflows hl_link conus_nextgen_hydrolocations hl_link poi_id "Select transfer fields" #
DeleteField AtlGulf_InflowsOutflows id;START_X;START_Y;END_X;END_Y "Delete Fields"
JoinField AtlGulf_InflowsOutflows poi_id conus_nextgen_pois poi_id id;nex_id "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField AtlGulf_InflowsOutflows id conus_nextgen_flowpaths id START_X;START_Y;END_X;END_Y;order "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField AtlGulf_InflowsOutflows id conus_nextgen_flowpath_attributes link TopWdth;TopWdthCC "Select transfer fields" #

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\richard.gibbs\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\PacNextGenInflows\PacNextGenInflows.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>AtlGulf_InflowsOutflows</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AlterField><field_name>id</field_name><new_field_name>flowpath_id</new_field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><clear_field_alias>False</clear_field_alias></AlterField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField AtlGulf_InflowsOutflows start_DomL "o" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField AtlGulf_InflowsOutflows end_DomLoc "i" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.
